"[24] C85-004 START 1185 FOR WHI CHEV TAHOE "
"[19] ^1039 CT633--HE CPZ LINE 13 AND WILL BE ENRT"
"[17] C85-004 GOT THE PTY O/O VEH"
"[11] THE RP WAS COMING IN ON THE BIG RIG SIDE-- THAT'S WHEN HE SAW IT "
"[2] SUV CAME FLYING OFF OF CARR RD "
